metadata.title:
Want ALL


TO Benefit

GARMENTS INCREASE At HILL.
YARD Is NOT GENERAL AND


SESSION IS CALLED At ST.

pages.raw_text:
The Great Northern railroad has
granted to it's employees in thein
carshops at Hillyard, Everett and
Havre, Mont, raise of Is cents
day, which has been accepted by
the carmen at these points. As
the demand for a general increase
OF wages along the whole system
has not been complied with, the
joint protective board of the Great
Northern system has been sum-
moned to conveen in st. Paul no
later than July 20.


John Aldrich. financial secre-
tary Of Pride of the West lodge,
No. 313, and chairman of the
joint protective board. left Hill
yard this morning for st. Paul. His
stay will be determined by the
amount of work the joint protective
board will perform. His instruc-
lions from the lodges are to re-
milan in ST. Paul until concessions
asked for are obtained from
officials of the road All lodges OF
the Brotherhood of Railroad Car.
men have been notified to have
their delegates in st. Paul no later
than July 22.


P. G. Cheyne, past chief Of Pride
of the West lodge, No. 313, left to.
day for Havre, Mont.
